data.title: UAE Suspends All Flights to and from Dubai Indefinitely
data.description: The United Arab Emirates has announced the suspension of all flights to and from Dubai until further notice. According to Odaily, this decision affects both incoming and outgoing flights, with no specified timeline for resumption.

data.title: Bitcoin Short Positions Reduced by Major Whale
data.description: According to Hyperinsight monitoring, the contract whale known as pension-usdt.eth is currently reducing its short positions in Bitcoin. According to BlockBeats, the whale initially held a short position of 1,000 Bitcoins, which has now been reduced to 900. The process of closing these positions is ongoing.

data.title: UK Engineers Collaborate with Ukrainian Colleagues to Expedite Vehicle Repairs
data.description: The UK Ministry of Defence has disclosed that British engineers are working alongside their Ukrainian counterparts in a repair center located in Ukraine. According to Jin10, the teams are laboring tirelessly to accelerate the restoration of damaged military vehicles and return them to the frontline. This collaboration aims to enhance operational efficiency and support Ukraine's defense efforts amid ongoing conflicts.

data.title: Deputy Chief of Staff of the Iranian President: We will respond firmly to any acts of aggression by the United States at its bases in the region.
data.description: Deputy Chief of Staff of the Iranian Presidential Office: (Clarifying the Iranian President's remarks) Iran will respond firmly to any acts of aggression by the United States at its bases in the region. Deputy Chief of Staff of the Iranian Presidential Office: We will not attack countries in the region if they do not cooperate with the United States. (Jin Shi)

data.title: Crude Oil Prices Reach Two-Year High
data.description: Crypto Rover posted on X. Crude oil prices have surged to their highest level in nearly two years. This increase is attributed to various factors influencing the global oil market, including supply constraints and rising demand. Analysts suggest that the current trend may continue if these conditions persist. The oil market has been experiencing fluctuations, but the recent spike marks a significant milestone, reflecting broader economic trends and geopolitical influences. Market observers are closely monitoring the situation to assess future developments in oil pricing.

data.title: South Korea Prepares Guidelines for Corporate Investment in Digital Assets
data.description:
South Korea's financial regulators are developing guidelines to enable publicly traded companies to invest in digital assets. According to BlockBeats, the move marks a shift from the previous focus on individual investors in the digital asset market. However, stablecoins are likely to be excluded from the list of permissible investment options.

The Financial Services Commission of South Korea is working on a 'Corporate Cryptocurrency Trading Guide,' which will specify the standards for listed companies and registered professional investment corporations to engage in digital asset transactions for investment or financial purposes. To prevent disorderly investment in the early stages of market development, the regulators have decided to exclude stablecoins like USDT and USDC from the permissible investment range. The guidelines are expected to be released following the establishment of the 'Basic Law on Digital Assets.'

data.title: Petróleos del Peru SA Appoints Fourth Board Chair in Five Months
data.description: Peru's state-owned oil company, Petróleos del Peru SA, has announced the appointment of a new board chair. Bloomberg posted on X that this marks the fourth leadership change for the company in a span of just five months. The frequent changes in leadership come as the company faces ongoing challenges in the oil refining sector. The new appointment aims to stabilize operations and address the issues that have plagued the company in recent months. Petróleos del Peru SA continues to navigate a complex landscape as it seeks to improve its performance and strategic direction.

data.title: Dutch Government Stands Firm on 36% Tax on Unrealized Gains
data.description: Crypto Rover posted on X that the Dutch Minister of Finance has confirmed the government's decision to maintain the new 36% tax on unrealized gains, despite earlier indications that it might be reconsidered. Two weeks ago, the minister suggested that the tax policy would be reviewed and potentially revised. However, he has now stated, 'We are definitely not going back to the drawing board,' signaling a firm stance on the matter. This development has led to criticism from citizens who feel misled by the government's previous statements.

data.title: “I Learnt That 10,000 XRP is Not Enough,” Crypto Rumor Mill Owner Says
data.description:
The owner of Crypto Rumor Mill recently revealed that he learnt 10,000 XRP may not be enough for investors looking for the big break. Investors have continued to assess how much XRP they may need to actually retire off their investments, as predictions suggesting XRP could rally to greater heights dominate community discussions despite the ongoing market turbulence. Visit Website
source: https://thecryptobasic.com/2026/03/07/i-learnt-that-10000-xrp-is-not-enough-crypto-rumor-mill-owner-says/

data.title: Ark Invest Adds Coinbase, Robinhood Shares
data.description:
Ark Invest increased stakes in Coinbase and Robinhood, buying about $16 million in shares as markets declined amid geopolitical tensions.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/cryptocurrencies/ark-invest-adds-coinbase-robinhood-shares/

data.title: Xi Jinping Urges Continued Military Purge Amid Corruption Concerns
data.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping has issued a stern warning to the military, emphasizing the need to avoid protecting corrupt or disloyal officials. Bloomberg posted on X that Xi's call comes as part of an ongoing effort to address corruption within the military, marking the largest purge in approximately 50 years. The initiative aims to reinforce discipline and loyalty within the ranks, ensuring the integrity of the armed forces. This move is seen as a critical step in maintaining the stability and effectiveness of China's military operations.

data.title: Pakistan and Saudi Arabia Discuss Security Measures After Iranian Strikes
data.description: Pakistan's army chief recently held discussions with Saudi Arabia's defense minister to address joint security measures in response to Iranian drone and missile attacks on Gulf states. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the significance of these talks amid rising regional tensions. The meeting underscores the ongoing collaboration between Pakistan and Saudi Arabia in maintaining stability and security in the Gulf region.

data.title: Trump Threatens Severe Action Against Iran
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has issued a stern warning to Iran, stating that the country could face significant repercussions today. CNN Breaking News posted on X, highlighting Trump's remarks about potential severe measures, including the possibility of 'complete destruction and certain death' in specific areas of Iran. This statement comes amid escalating tensions between the United States and Iran, raising concerns about the potential for military conflict. The international community is closely monitoring the situation, as the implications of such actions could have far-reaching consequences for regional stability and global relations.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 68,000 USDT with a 2.73% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 07, 2026, 12:09 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 68,000 USDT and is now trading at 67,989 USDT, with a narrowed 2.73% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Iran launches six missiles at Israel within 12 hours
data.description: According to the latest reports from Jerusalem, Iran launched six rounds of missiles at Israel between midnight and noon local time today. Local health authorities stated that there are no reports of casualties so far. Separately, the Israeli military announced that it launched a series of airstrikes against Tehran and central Iran from the night of the 6th to the early morning of the 7th, deploying more than 80 fighter jets and dropping 230 bombs. (CCTV International News)

data.title: UAE Defense Ministry Reports Successful Interception of Iranian Missiles and Drones
data.description: The United Arab Emirates (UAE) Defense Ministry announced that its air defense systems successfully intercepted ballistic missiles, cruise missiles, and drone attacks from Iran. According to Jin10, the UAE's defense capabilities were put to the test as they managed to thwart these threats effectively. The interception highlights the ongoing tensions in the region and the UAE's preparedness to counter potential threats. The ministry emphasized the importance of maintaining robust defense measures to ensure national security amid regional instability.

data.title: Binance Dominates Spot Trading With Nearly 40% Market Share
data.description:
CoinGecko’s top 10 spot exchange rankings by cumulative volume from August 2025 through January 2026 show Binance in a commanding lead with $3. 54 trillion and 39. 6% market share, while the remaining nine exchanges cluster tightly between 6. 1% and 8
source: https://www.ethnews.com/binance-dominates-spot-trading-with-nearly-40-market-share/

data.title: Coruna: iOS malware that empties crypto wallets
data.description:
Google discovers Coruna, a hacking toolkit that infects iPhones without a click and steals the seed phrases of 18 crypto apps including MetaMask, Exodus and Trust Wallet. All it took was iOS 17. 2. 1 to be vulnerable.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/hack/coruna-ios-malware-that-empties-crypto-wallets/
